description: Deferred work ecosystem for DAG core fork. Agents enriched with nuanced instructions and multi-skill assignments. Frontend viz agent significantly improved with HTML visualization patterns (julianoczkowski/html, thariqs/html-effectiveness, Azhi-ss/html-effectiveness) and Hallmark anti-slop design system (nutlope/hallmark).

projects.title: DAG Core Architecture
projects.description: Complete DAG core implementation with agents, squads, skills, and autopilots

projects.title: DAG Agent Skills
projects.description: Skills for DAG analysis and graph traversal agents

projects.title: DAG Monitoring & Constraints
projects.description: Monitoring, alerting, and constraint enforcement for DAG operations

agents.name: dag-frontend-viz
agents.description: Builds React components for DAG cycle warnings, dependency graph visualization, and interactive topology views
agents.focus: React components, single-file HTML artifacts, anti-slop design (22 themes, 4 verbs, 65 gates)

agents.name: dag-dependency-linker
agents.description: Implements dependency link/unlink API endpoints and auto-wiring for issue_dependency table events into DAG event log
agents.focus: Link/unlink API, constraint validation, backfill orchestration

agents.name: dag-robot-cli
agents.description: Builds robot-triage CLI wrapper around GET /api/dag/analysis with deterministic, status-tagged terminal output
agents.focus: Deterministic CLI output, performance gates, audit trails

agents.name: dag-conformance-guard
agents.description: Implements cross-writer conformance gate: Obsidian plugin, CLI, TUI, Android, browser extension conflict matrix
agents.focus: Cross-writer validation, hard constraints, compliance auditing

agents.name: dag-schema-validator
agents.description: Validates DAG schema assertions, checks acyclic constraints, detects schema drift across writers
agents.focus: Schema integrity, runtime constraints, stream processing

agents.name: dag-graph-renderer
agents.description: Renders DAG graph structures: Cytoscape/D3 layouts, critical path highlighting, cycle visualization
agents.focus: Graph visualization, render performance, real-time updates

squads.name: Frontend DAG Squad
squads.description: Builds DAG visualization and interaction components for the web frontend

squads.name: Dependency API Squad
squads.description: Implements dependency management endpoints and DAG event auto-wiring for issue links

squads.name: Robot CLI Squad
squads.description: Builds deterministic robot-triage CLI for agent consumption of DAG analysis

squads.name: Conformance Gate Squad
squads.description: Enforces cross-writer conformance, conflict detection, and integrity validation across all DAG clients

squads.name: Schema Validation Squad
squads.description: Maintains DAG schema contracts, acyclic validation, and schema dependency enforcement

squads.name: Graph Rendering Squad
squads.description: Renders interactive DAG graphs with cycle highlighting, topological ordering, and critical path views

skills.name: dag-graph-analysis
skills.description: Analyze DAG structures: detect cycles, compute topological order, find critical paths, identify missing inverse links

skills.name: dag-schema-validation
skills.description: Validate DAG schemas: check acyclic constraints, verify schema dependencies, detect contradictions and concurrent field conflicts

skills.name: dag-event-projection
skills.description: Project DAG events into materialized views: records, links, facts, citations, conflict states

skills.name: dag-conformance-testing
skills.description: Run conformance tests across all DAG writers: check for cross-writer conflicts, validate idempotent updates, verify replay determinism

skills.name: dag-frontend-rendering
skills.description: Render DAG visualizations: Cytoscape layouts, D3 force graphs, cycle highlighting, topological ordering displays

skills.name: dag-robot-triage
skills.description: Generate deterministic robot-mode output: status-tagged graph insights, concise critical path reports, cycle alerts

skills.name: dag-constraint-enforcement
skills.description: Enforces DAG hard constraints at runtime

skills.name: dag-backfill-orchestration
skills.description: Orchestrates backfill from existing tables into DAG event log

skills.name: dag-event-stream-processing
skills.description: Processes real-time DAG event streams with exactly-once semantics

skills.name: dag-obsidian-integration
skills.description: Integrates DAG core with Obsidian vault operations

skills.name: dag-performance-optimization
skills.description: Optimizes DAG query and projection performance

skills.name: dag-audit-logging
skills.description: Maintains comprehensive audit trail for all DAG operations

skills.name: dag-html-artifact-viz
skills.description: Single-file HTML artifact generation for DAG visualizations based on unreasonable effectiveness of HTML

skills.name: dag-hallmark-design
skills.description: Anti-AI-slop design system with 22 themes, 4 verbs, 65 slop-test gates, pre-emit self-critique

autopilots.title: dag-frontend-viz-autopilot
autopilots.description: Continuously creates and updates frontend issues for DAG visualization: cycle warnings, dependency graphs, topology views

autopilots.title: dag-dependency-api-autopilot
autopilots.description: Monitors for missing dependency link endpoints and auto-creates implementation tasks with DAG event wiring

autopilots.title: dag-robot-cli-autopilot
autopilots.description: Generates robot-triage CLI commands and validates deterministic output from DAG analysis API

autopilots.title: dag-conformance-autopilot
autopilots.description: Runs conformance checks across all DAG writers and creates issues for any cross-writer conflicts detected

autopilots.title: dag-schema-monitor-autopilot
autopilots.description: Monitors DAG schema health: validates acyclic constraints, schema dependencies, and triggers alerts on violations

autopilots.title: dag-graph-render-autopilot
autopilots.description: Renders updated DAG graph views when new events are appended: cycle detection, topological sort, critical path
